nasb.text: The servant-girl saw him, and began once more to say to the bystanders, “This is one of them!”

esv.text: And the servant girl saw him and began again to say to the bystanders, “This man is one of them.”

cnv.text: 那婢女看見他，又對站在旁邊的人說：“這個人也是他們一夥的。”

ccb.text: 一会儿，那婢女又看见彼得，就对旁边的人说：“他是跟他们一伙的！”

csbs.text: 那女仆看见他，又开始对站在旁边的人说：“这个人是与他们一伙的。”
